name: print-upscale-studio
description: Hybrid local and cloud AI image enhancement toolkit for print workflows, with storage hygiene, RGB quality checks and structurally verified ICC-managed CMYK TIFF output including macOS ColorSync and Model Lab copies.
author: ngoctunguyenle@gmail.com

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test:smoke
scripts.prepare:assets: npm run runtime:fetch && npm run profiles:fetch
scripts.dist:win: npm run runtime:fetch -- --platform win32 --arch x64 && npm run profiles:fetch && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win nsis portable --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:x64: npm run runtime:fetch -- --platform darwin --arch x64 && npm run profiles:fetch && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: npm run runtime:fetch -- --platform darwin --arch arm64 && npm run profiles:fetch && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg --arm64 --publish never
